title: Phase 1: Bump Next.js 13 -> 14 (pages router)
description: First phase of staged Next.js upgrade. Bump next, eslint-config-next, related deps to 14.2.x. Keep pages router. Verify build and full test suite pass before moving to phase 2.
close_reason: Bumped next 13.4.13 -> 14.2.35, next-auth 4.22.4 -> 4.24.11, eslint-config-next 13.4.13 -> 14.2.18. Jest suite 24/24 green; next build compiles all 16 routes; npm run lint clean.

title: Add tRPC router regression tests for upgrade safety
description: Expand jest coverage so the framework upgrade has meaningful regression protection. Target: card router (findMany, search), collection router happy paths (create, update, byId, getAll auth, getDeletedCollections, destroy). These tests must pass before AND after each upgrade phase.
notes: Added card.test.ts (6 tests covering findMany + search pagination + zod validation). Extended collection.test.ts with happy paths for getAll auth scoping, getDeletedCollections, byId, create, update, destroy + ownership check. Test count went 10 -> 24, all passing.

title: Upgrade to Next.js 15 with App Router
description: Upgrade Next.js from 13.4 to 15 with App Router migration. Staged approach: phase 1 = bump 13 -> 14 keeping pages router, phase 2 = bump 14 -> 15, phase 3 = migrate to app router. Each phase gated by passing regression suite (tRPC router tests + Playwright smoke for auth/collection golden paths).

title: Fix GitHub Action for database migrations on main
Card order changes when updating count
Vercel trying to build test files
Playwright: deeper e2e for magic-link auth + collection CRUD
description: Follow-up to magicvault-ogu. Build on the scaffold to cover: (1) magic-link sign in by polling Mailcatcher API at localhost:1080 for the verification email and visiting the link; (2) authenticated create-collection flow ending at /collection/[id]; (3) soft-delete and recover flow. Requires docker stack up via npm run dev:docker.

title: Phase 3: Migrate from pages router to app router
description: Final phase. Move src/pages/* to src/app/* with new conventions: layouts, server components, route handlers replacing API routes (except NextAuth which stays as pages route or migrates to its own app handler), tRPC adapter swap to fetch adapter. Most invasive phase.

title: Phase 2: Bump Next.js 14 -> 15 (pages router)
description: Second phase after phase 1 ships. Next 15 changes async dynamic APIs (cookies/headers/params/searchParams). Pages router remains supported. Verify regression suite still green.

title: Add Playwright smoke tests for auth + collections golden paths
description: Minimal e2e coverage for the framework upgrade. Tests: landing page renders, sign-in page renders, magic-link auth via mailcatcher, create-collection flow. Requires docker stack running. Documented as 'npm run test:e2e'.
notes: Scaffolding done: playwright.config.ts with chromium project + baseURL env override; e2e/smoke.spec.ts with 3 specs (landing renders, unauthed nav hidden, /api/auth/signin reachable); test:e2e npm script; .gitignore updated for playwright artifacts. NOT done and not yet verified by an actual browser run: magic-link auth via mailcatcher and collection CRUD flow. Follow-up issue created.
close_reason: Minimal smoke scaffold landed; deeper auth + CRUD e2e split into magicvault-n9p
